# Oriol Macias — Backend Developer

> Backend developer with 8+ years of experience, specialized in Python/Django and REST APIs, with industrial protocol integration (SNMP, Modbus, BACnet) and DCIM platform work across data-center infrastructure. Currently integrating LLMs into real products and building his own AI engineering tooling. Based in Madrid (Spain); EU citizen, eligible for a Swiss B-permit; open to relocating to Switzerland.

## About
From systems administration to backend engineering. For the past several years I have built integration software connecting heterogeneous external systems and DCIM platforms across data-center infrastructure. I work with AI every day: Claude Code as a daily tool, integrating LLMs into real products, and building my own engineering tooling (Poneglyph). Continuously learning, and open to relocating to Switzerland.

## Experience
- **Senior Backend Developer** — Bjumper (2018–Present)
  - Industrial protocol integration: SNMP, Modbus, BACnet
  - Bidirectional integrations between heterogeneous systems and DCIM platforms (e.g. iTRACS)
  - ETL microservices and REST APIs (Django REST Framework, FastAPI)
  - PostgreSQL data modeling; Celery/Redis for asynchronous processing; Docker deployment
- **Junior Developer (Android / C#)** — Busmatick (2018)
- **Systems Administrator & IT Support** — SERES, Educand SCCL, Salt City Council (2014–2017)

## Technical Skills
### Programming Languages
Python, C#, .NET, Java

### Frameworks & Libraries
Django, Django REST Framework, FastAPI, Flask, SQLAlchemy, Alembic, Celery, Pytest, WPF

### Protocols & Data Formats
SNMP, Modbus, BACnet, REST API, JSON, XML, JWT, NFC

### Databases
PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis

### DevOps & Tools
Docker, Git, GitHub Actions, CI/CD, AWS, Nginx, Gunicorn

### AI / LLM
Claude Code (daily driver), LLM integration into production products, agentic tooling (Poneglyph — TypeScript/Bun)

## Selected Projects
- **Poneglyph** — Personal orchestration layer for AI coding agents (Claude Code): skills, hooks, rules, and multi-agent workflows that turn an LLM into a disciplined engineering co-worker. TypeScript/Bun. https://github.com/MaciWP/claude-code-poneglyph
- **SNMP Monitor** — Web platform for SNMP device discovery, monitoring, and real-time visualization. Django, PostgreSQL, Celery, Redis.
- **Card Vision Tracker** — Computer-vision app for real-time card detection and score tracking using ONNX models. Python, Kivy, ONNX.
- **Professional work at Bjumper** — DCIM and integration platforms (iTRACS, ThinkData, HPE IMC, VMware, PowerIQ, NFC asset management). Repositories are private under confidentiality agreements.

## Education & Certifications
- Higher Technical Diploma in Multiplatform Application Development — UNIR (2025)
- SP2 EcoStruxure IT Advanced Technical Certification — Schneider Electric (2019)
- Technical Diploma in Microcomputer Systems and Networks — IES Salvador Espriu (2012)

## Availability
- Work authorization: EU citizen; eligible for a Swiss B-permit
- Location: Madrid, Spain — open to relocating to Switzerland (Zurich, Basel, Geneva, Lausanne) or roles in Spain
- Notice period: 2 weeks
- Employment: Full-time, remote-friendly
